speaker: MATT
raw_text: Stunned means you can't really do anything this turn, but half make a sentence. You're aware of your surroundings but you can't take actions or move. At the end of your turn, it wears off.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Guys, we're doing fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Beau, Jester, Yasha, and Nott. As this faint energy begins to disperse throughout the chamber, you hear thousands of voices trying to whisper into your ears simultaneously. They're not making sense, and as they weave, your whole body begins to go catatonic. Your muscles tense and you fall to your knees. You're all paralyzed until the end of your next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! We're in big trouble, you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to fly up and back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, I have a question. When we're paralyzed, does that mean every attack against us is a critical?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Every melee is, if it hits. That ends its turn. That brings us to Beau. You're paralyzed, so at the end of your turn it fades. Sorry, not paralyzed, stunned. It's not paralyzed. It's stunned.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Stunned.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. It is not-- I had to read--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What can I do?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: After reading through the notes and going through the book, you recall that a lot of the magic in here entails binding the soul to the remains of the physical form, as you've seen with all of the wisps. It is a similar return of the entity you just fought.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! He's back? Okay, we run away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The same entity comes through the bookcase, like it's emerging from something behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Grab his heart and run. From the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There was no heart on the ground

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you struck it, the energy dispersed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's run away.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What if we have to get it with the sword?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's a two-handed weapon. I can't do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yasha can, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why? You're strong! You can do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can't use two-handed weapons.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys watch it push out of the wall, (gasping sound) making its way there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! Maybe if we show it the sword, he'll chill out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, make an intelligence check. You make a religion check with advantage, because you have undead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just a straight intelligence?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Straight intelligence modifier.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys take a short rest of about an hour or so, as you sit down and recover your breath, take a moment to center yourself, tend to your wounds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Smoke grenade! That's awesome!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mushroom cloud, that was great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like Rick Moranis in Ghostbusters 2.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is there any way to get in there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It looks like it's holed up. The small hole looks like somebody tried to push through, or previously emerged and bricked what they could. You can't fit through the hole, unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start trying to open it up. I want to go in there, look for things, and break every damn--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait! We should heal, you guys. Should we take a short rest and heal up a little bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We should take a short rest. A breather, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Jester, thank you for healing me. I feel like I did not deserve that, but thank you very much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! You're welcome. You deserved it so much! You did so good!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy, I've already used most of my hit dice. That's crazy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No, there's nothing else. You look down into the box. There are sets of gold and silver rings and jewelry. It looks like whatever jewelry once may have been dressed upon the individual who was interred in that urn that was scattered. This is where their jewelry was placed.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Those boxes, can I check in those?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, which one? There's one on each side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the right one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you take the right one. You lift the lid, and as you do, you pull it open and powder emerges into your face. Make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Constitution save? That would be a four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Four? Okay! You take nine points of poison damage, and you're poisoned for the next hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This cloud enters your lungs and you begin coughing. It burns the inside of your throat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey Nott, how's it going in there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Great! It's fine! I'm going to cast Mage Hand and open the other one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There we go. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a five feet by five?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's five by five.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're in a tiny-- Why don't you bring that thing out of there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No! I've got this! I'm fine! I'll find the treasure! There's nothing else in there?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No, there's nothing else. You look down into the box. There are sets of gold and silver rings and jewelry. It looks like whatever jewelry once may have been dressed upon the individual who was interred in that urn that was scattered. This is where their jewelry was placed.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Those boxes, can I check in those?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, which one? There's one on each side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the right one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you take the right one. You lift the lid, and as you do, you pull it open and powder emerges into your face. Make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Constitution save? That would be a four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Four? Okay! You take nine points of poison damage, and you're poisoned for the next hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This cloud enters your lungs and you begin coughing. It burns the inside of your throat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey Nott, how's it going in there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Great! It's fine! I'm going to cast Mage Hand and open the other one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There we go. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a five feet by five?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's five by five.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're in a tiny-- Why don't you bring that thing out of there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No! I've got this! I'm fine! I'll find the treasure! There's nothing else in there?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: There you go. The Crawling King is known as-- What you can recall with a 20, strangely, and the information comes to you esoterically. You're not entirely certain where the inspiration for this knowledge comes from, but you have these images of one of the betrayer gods in history. You've heard stories or something that inspires you to remember something inhuman and larva-like: a monstrous, terrible worm crawling through the deepest tunnels of the world. Now locked away, Post-Calamity, with all the rest of the betrayer gods.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What do we remember about the Crawling King? Do you know anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That would be a religion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will make a religion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I will make one too, but I'm not going to count it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Advantage, or no?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For you? No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 15 for Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. That's a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it wasn't an herbalism kit. I'm stupid. It wasn't an herbalism kit that could heal the poison. It was medicinal herbs. That's what I had in my inventory that I remembered.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh. You rolled pretty well, same difference. We'll say it would have lasted a little longer, but you still managed to outlast the poison. There was no threat at that moment. What'd you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15 religion? Anybody else? No?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I rolled it, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did you say you rolled a one?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: A one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You rolled a one, another one!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He goes, "Well, thank you for your honesty. Anything else?" He gives a very intense look across each of your faces. "You would like to inform me that you found, encountered, any warnings? We're going back in after there to clear out whatever remains behind so we want to make sure we're prepared."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I smack her on the back of the head.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You can't reach.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's right! You're up. I swat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There was a fair amount of jewelry. There was.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We also found a decent amount of fine art for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yes! I pull out the vases. Look at these antiques!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He pulls one out. Inspects it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Careful, they're very old.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. I'm a collector myself. It's fine. This is beautiful make. This is pre-Divergence as well. (chuckles)."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bet they're worth a whole of money then, huh?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, most certainly! To the right people, they can be worth quite a bit."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We found some candlesticks too.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Also some candlesticks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right." You produce the candelabra. "These six rings, you say."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It was seven. I give one of the extra rings.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I didn't keep mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Look, we know who has them. We know.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I'll say sure. I'll give you advantage on this. Because you both--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What were you looking for, anyway?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Nothing. I wish to be informed that that is the end of your recovery."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You knew going in here it was heavily looted and raided. We brought you several pieces--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm going to go out on a limb here and inform you that, as much as you try to doublespeak me, that I've been a master far longer than you have."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Give him the book.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (sigh) Caleb, we talked about this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and we said that we'd give him the book, so I'm a little confused.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, man. Been in the business longer than we have. I toss him the research notebook.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He catches it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Here's the precious research you were looking for.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right. Thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're welcome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Is that all of it?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! Who, just me? Can he help me?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I said no at the same time. Can she aid me?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We shall see. Anyway, you musn't be seen dilly dallying along at this home, just in case. Thank you for the update, thank you for Horris, and good luck, friends. I do hope we meet again soon, in better times."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: When it makes sense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. How is Horris?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: On his way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, thank god."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To Berleben.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To Berleben? That's far enough away, I think, from any influence here. Thank you. Thank you so much."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Of course. It was the least we can do. We trust with this information and the right things occurring in the next few days, you can find your way to some prosperous moves for this city.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I hope so."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A lot of bad things are happening now. It would be nice if one good thing could come of it all.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That would be. I'd like to see a turn for the right in this city, or another, at least. There is right in this city. There are good people. As terrible as the death of the High-Richter may be, in essence I think much good may come out of it, in the long run."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's entirely up to you now, isn't it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We shall see. Anyway, you musn't be seen dilly dallying along at this home, just in case. Thank you for the update, thank you for Horris, and good luck, friends. I do hope we meet again soon, in better times."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: When it makes sense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. How is Horris?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: On his way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, thank god."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To Berleben.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To Berleben? That's far enough away, I think, from any influence here. Thank you. Thank you so much."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Of course. It was the least we can do. We trust with this information and the right things occurring in the next few days, you can find your way to some prosperous moves for this city.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I hope so."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A lot of bad things are happening now. It would be nice if one good thing could come of it all.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That would be. I'd like to see a turn for the right in this city, or another, at least. There is right in this city. There are good people. As terrible as the death of the High-Richter may be, in essence I think much good may come out of it, in the long run."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's entirely up to you now, isn't it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I'll happily give you 30 gold pieces for that there sword, if you don't mind?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Good job. Over and out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will go to Mr. Sol's establishment. (phone trilling)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's the sound the door makes when you enter Pumat's store!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Where are you going?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: To Pumat's to buy ink and paper.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Easy enough to do. "You go ahead and purchase enough materials as you need to get your spells there transcribed. Good on you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. I buy 200 gold worth and I bring Nott the 85 gold change.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: May I sell my other sword?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You may. It's not going to fetch you too much because it's seen a lot of use. "

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I sharpen it. It's so sharp. I sharpen it every night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's wonderful. I think in the long run, that'll be a very useful feature, but it's also not that uncommon of an object-- "

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's touched by the moon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah. I'm touched by the sun every morning." (laughter)
